target: sections.json §4.1 prose fixes: λ_g annotation false promise + TLDR count accuracy + generate-html.js falsifiability reconciliation note

patches.description: ISS-1728: §4.1 — 'the audit table below annotates each' implied per-entry annotation; changed to 'the Shared Constant column in the audit table below marks the shared inputs per row' to accurately describe what the table provides
patches.find_pattern: the audit table below annotates each
patches.replace_pattern: the Shared Constant column in the audit table below marks the shared inputs per row

patches.description: ISS-1729: §4.1 TLDR — 'applied to only 9 of the site's 69+ claims' was stale; updated to '9 of 83 registry items (69 confirmed, 4 refined, 10 prospective)' to reflect full registry
patches.find_pattern: applied to only 9 of the site's 69+ claims
patches.replace_pattern: applied to only 9 of 83 registry items (69 confirmed, 4 refined, 10 prospective)

patches.description: ISS-1653: falsifiability module caption — added dynamic reconciliation note when wins.length > counts.total explaining that verdict bars include review-authored supplements excluded from the 'total' count
patches.find_pattern: claimed wins — any one is sufficient to upgrade a verdict.
patches.replace_pattern: claimed wins — any one is sufficient to upgrade a verdict. (reconciliation note injected dynamically)

tldr_evidence: ISS-1728: 'annotates each' was imprecise — only the Shared Constant column per row is marked, not each CWE or argument. ISS-1729: site now has 83 registry items; '69+' was both stale and vague. ISS-1653: when wins.json contains review-authored supplements, the bar chart total differs from counts.total, confusing readers who compare the two.
tldr_verdict: PATCHED — all three prose corrections applied, built, tested.
